mapper.select: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM scholarship_apply GROUP BY status
SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM scholarship_apply GROUP BY type ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT type, SUM(amount) AS totalAmount, COUNT(*) AS count, ROUND(AVG(amount), 2) AS avgAmount FROM scholarship_apply WHERE amount IS NOT NULL GROUP BY type ORDER BY totalAmount DESC
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(apply_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM scholarship_apply WHERE apply_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(apply_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 12
SELECT SUM(amount) AS totalAmount, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, ROUND(AVG(amount), 2) AS avgAmount FROM scholarship_apply WHERE amount IS NOT NULL
